description_long: This is a stylized adult figure dressed in a modern, urban outfit consisting of a hooded sweatshirt with a prominent logo, matching shorts, and high-top athletic shoes. The hoodie is worn up, obscuring the hair and partially shadowing the face, which is covered by a reflective mask or visor. The clothing features metallic accents, particularly on the sleeves, shorts, and shoes, giving the ensemble a fashionable, high-end streetwear appearance. The figure's build is athletic, with defined limbs and a relaxed, upright stance. The overall look suggests a blend of casual comfort and luxury, suitable for a trendy city environment. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: A fashionable adult in a hooded sweatshirt, shorts, and high-top shoes with metallic accents, standing upright with a reflective face covering. The outfit exudes modern, high-end streetwear style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hooded sweatshirt, reflective face covering, and logo on the chest, with both arms and legs visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the metallic sleeve and shoe details, as well as the profile of the hood and mask.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hood, plain back of the sweatshirt, and the shorts, with both arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the metallic sleeve and shoe, and the side profile of the hood and mask.
attribute_clothing_type: hooded sweatshirt with logo, athletic shorts, and high-top athletic shoes
